title: Founder of Chedilex invited to participate in the launch of ARC in AOU Lebanon
description: Chedilex founder invited to participate in the launch of the Annual Robotics Competition (ARC) at the Arab Open University Tripoli branch in Lebanon. This initiative aims to foster innovation, and development in the field of robotics, providing a platform for students and professionals to explore cutting-edge technologies and their applications.

title: Chedilex has been appointed the official managing website for Live-Love-Assia.
description:
Chedilex has officially been appointed as the managing entity for the Live-Love-Assia website, marking an important milestone in the platform’s development. Following an extended period of dedicated work, the project has now been successfully launched, reflecting a strong commitment to delivering a high-quality digital experience for the Assia community and its visitors.

This collaboration represents a significant step forward in enhancing digital access to local information and community engagement, further strengthening the connection between the platform and its audience.

title: New Opportunity to Organize Restaurants with TexasPOS
description:
Restaurants today need speed, accuracy, and smart management to stay ahead. With TexasPOS, restaurant owners now have a new opportunity to organize their business more efficiently and deliver a better customer experience.

TexasPOS helps manage orders, tables, payments, and inventory in one easy system. From dine-in and takeaway to delivery management, the platform simplifies daily operations and reduces mistakes inside the restaurant. Staff can process orders faster, while managers can monitor sales and performance in real time.

The system also provides detailed reports and analytics, helping restaurant owners make smarter business decisions and improve profitability. With its modern and user-friendly interface, TexasPOS is designed to support restaurants of all sizes looking to grow and stay organized in a competitive market.

title: What happened on the IEEE AOU website?
description: The IEEE AOU website was hacked because its design was outdated. A new user interface was designed by Chedilex, which is now managing the official website for the student branch at Arab Open University.
